goal: Build Cortex — a two-layer personal memory system for Claude Code. Curated layer (FTS5, high-signal extracted facts) + Raw layer (sqlite-vec, full-text chunks with vectors). Python MCP server accessible cross-machine via Tailscale. Extraction-first design: the system writes memories, not the user.
stack: Python 3.11+, SQLite FTS5, sqlite-vec, fastembed (bge-small-en-v1.5), mcp Python SDK (FastMCP), pytest
